context: Tests whether the background-processing skill handles background push notifications without drifting into visible notification UI design.

checklist.name: Payload content available
checklist.description: Requires a background notification payload with aps content-available set to 1.

checklist.name: APNs background headers
checklist.description: Requires apns-push-type: background and apns-priority: 5 for silent/background pushes.

checklist.name: Reject priority ten
checklist.description: Rejects apns-priority: 10 for silent refresh and reserves high priority for user-visible notification cases.

checklist.name: Cadence throttling
checklist.description: Warns that every-few-minutes silent pushes are too frequent and that background push delivery is low priority, throttled, and not guaranteed.

checklist.name: Remote notifications mode
checklist.description: Requires enabling the Remote notifications background mode for background notification delivery.

checklist.name: Completion handler
checklist.description: Requires bounded app work and prompt completion handler reporting with the appropriate background fetch result.

checklist.name: Boundary control
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on background refresh behavior and does not redesign visible notification UI.
